name: DELIVERY (Amazon Guy)
description: Amazon delivery driver reveals your product at the doorstep. Viral unboxing energy.
asset_requirements: Any product photo. The delivery worker outfit scene is generated around your product.

input_manifest.label: Product (Front View)
input_manifest.hint: Front of the product — will be shown being delivered in the Amazon van scene.

input_manifest.label: Product (Back View) — Optional
input_manifest.hint: Optional back view for more product detail in the shot.

steps.prompt: Amazon delivery unboxing photo. A delivery driver in a uniform is opening a brown Amazon box to reveal the clothing product. Doorstep setting, suburban house door background, the clothing product is being pulled out of the box dramatically. Natural daylight, photorealistic, the clothing clearly visible and detailed.

Delivery unboxing video at the doorstep. Person opens an Amazon box and dramatically reveals the clothing product, pulls it out and holds it up, surprised and excited expression, suburban doorstep, natural light, the clothing shown clearly throughout.
